title: Xtra Crispy Dutch Stracciatella Cheese Skillet
description: A tangy and snappy Dutch dish featuring stracciatella cheese, this skillet is a quick fix for any meal, and can be made vegan friendly with a few simple substitutions.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the diced potatoes with 1 tablespoon of olive oil and 1/2 teaspoon of salt until they are evenly coated.
Add the potatoes to the air fryer basket and cook for 10 minutes, shaking halfway through.
In a large skillet, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onions and cook until they are translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced bell peppers and cook until they are tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the crushed tomatoes, paprika, and air fry seasoning, and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the cooked potatoes, stracciatella cheese, and a pinch of salt and pepper to the skillet, and stir until the cheese is melted and the potatoes are coated.
Transfer the skillet to the air fryer basket and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the top is crispy and golden brown.
